tools.name: list_songs
tools.title: List built-in songs
tools.description: List the built-in learnable songs available in Virtual Grand Piano Pro, with id, title, composer, difficulty, and BPM.

tools.name: get_song
tools.title: Get a built-in song
tools.description: Return the full note sequence (note, time in beats, duration in beats) for a built-in song by id.

tools.name: compose_song
tools.title: Compose a song with AI
tools.description: Generate an original short piano melody plus an optional 16-step drum pattern from a text idea, style, and mood. Uses Lovable AI. Returns notes in scientific pitch notation with beat-based timing plus drum step indices, ready to load into the piano studio.

prompt.description: Describe the song idea, e.g. 'A hopeful piano intro in C major that builds emotion.'

style.description: Musical style, e.g. Cinematic, Lo-Fi, Jazz, Classical, Trap, House, Ambient, Pop Ballad.

mood.description: Emotional mood, e.g. Happy, Melancholic, Epic, Chill, Dark, Romantic, Energetic, Dreamy.

wantBeat.description: Include a matching 16-step drum pattern. Default true.
